notes: Like with many of these old titles, the fullscreen doesn't seem to work with Proton or on Windows. So not a Proton issue. Outside of this, works perfect.
title: Typer Shark! Deluxe

notes: No fullscreen but game plays perfectly.
title: Typer Shark! Deluxe

notes: Everything except fullscreen works, even the custom cursor.
title: Typer Shark! Deluxe

notes: Played about 2 hours under Proton, fullscreen seems to work but it lags a fair bit. Not sure why. Aside from this, flawless experience.
title: Typer Shark! Deluxe

notes: Ran in fullscreen on my laptop by default, it didn't on my PC. If you use a custom cursor, the game will start to lag if the game is in fullscreen (it's fine in windowed mode). I'm not sure why, but don't use a custom cursor and you'll be fine! The game isn't really focused on the mouse anyway :-) This issue could be present on Windows too, but I haven't tested. There is also no issue with quitting the game as noted in the Steam reviews, so I'd say perhaps the game runs even better on Linux than on Windows! On this laptop hardware, while it got a little hot, CPU usage was never too high and the game ran at a consistent framerate. Fun little time killer!
title: Typer Shark! Deluxe
